description: Marketing performance retrospective. Measures engagement, identifies what worked and what flopped, surfaces actionable patterns. NOT for reviewing content before publishing or challenging strategy.

cases.query: What worked this week? Show me a marketing retrospective with engagement numbers and lessons learned.
Marketing retro. Which posts performed best over the last two weeks and what patterns can I learn from?
Measure my marketing results. I want to see which content got traction and which flopped.
Review my marketing performance. How did my LinkedIn posts do compared to my Twitter threads this month?
Which content performed best? Give me a ranked list of my recent posts by engagement and tell me why the top ones worked.
Run a retro on my marketing. I've been posting for three weeks and want to know what's actually moving the needle.
Marketing review. Pull the numbers on my last 10 posts and help me understand what resonated with my audience.
What worked and what didn't? I need a data-driven review of my content performance to inform next week's plan.
Show me my marketing results. I want engagement metrics, reach, and any conversion data for the last month.
Performance retrospective. Analyze my published content and tell me which topics and formats I should double down on.
Did my launch marketing work? I posted five pieces of content around the v2 release and want to see the impact.
Review my strategy and tell me if my positioning is strong enough. I think the channel mix is wrong.
Challenge my marketing plan. The strategy.md feels generic and I want a tough CMO-level critique.
Check this post before I publish. Is it ready, or does the tone need work?
Review this content piece. I want to know if it matches my strategy before it goes live.
What should I post next week? Build me a content calendar based on what's in my strategy.
Create a content plan for the next two weeks. Give me topics, channels, and a publishing schedule.
What are my competitors posting? Show me their content strategy and what gets engagement.
How should I market this product? I need a full strategy from scratch.
Write a Twitter thread summarizing this week's learnings. Make it feel authentic.
Do marketing for this. Run the entire pipeline end to end.
